records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate only if the Macao SAR Government announces a new horse-racing concession or domestic racing system.
records.blocked_reason: The Macao SAR Government states that the horse-racing concession ended and horse-racing activities ceased from 1 April 2024.
limitations: The concession termination date is archive context only.
No current meeting fields are approved.
The racecourse transition period must not be presented as active racing.
records.notes: Publish an archive page and exclude Macau from current-calendar listings.
